response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the potential for false information and to verify the credibility of sources. Social media platforms should also take responsibility for monitoring and removing fake content from their platforms. Additionally, users can report suspicious or false content to the platform, and use fact-checking tools to verify the accuracy of information. Furthermore, it is important to be cautious when sharing information on social media, and to verify the credibility of sources before doing so. Finally, educating oneself on how to identify and deal with fake news can help individuals make informed decisions and avoid spreading false information."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the potential for false information and to verify the credibility of sources. Social media platforms should also take responsibility for monitoring and removing fake content from their platforms. Additionally, users can report suspicious or false content to the platform, and use fact-checking tools to verify the accuracy of information. Furthermore, it is important to be cautious when sharing information on social media, and to verify the credibility of sources before doing so. Finally, educating oneself on how to identify and deal with fake news can help individuals make informed decisions and avoid spreading false information.
